message:
fix(e2e): correct supportsCommand to actually run the command

The supportsCommand function in logs_test.go and monitor_test.go was
checking top-level --help output for presence of command names, which
could falsely match strings in help text examples.

Fixed to run `ntm <cmd> --help` and check for "unknown command" in
output, matching the correct pattern in activity_metrics_test.go and
summary_profile_test.go.

Also includes test improvements from other agents:
- archiver_test: fix edge case test expectation for suffix matching
- init_test: strengthen git hooks tests with actual verification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
